calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-08-28 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Unicorn Consulting, Inc. To Compel Responses To Discovery From Defendant Sonia Medina-Ashby, That Matters In Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Unicorn Consulting, Inc.'s Motion Of Plaintiff Unicorn Consulting, Inc. To Compel Responses To Discovery From Defendant Sonia Medina-Ashby, That Matters In Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-06-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Continued To Oct-01-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Sonia Medina-Ashby's motion to dismiss is denied. Ms. Medina-Ashby fails to identify any basis to dismiss all or any portion of this case nor does she provide any legal or factual explanation for her motion.

Order Submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
